category_sources: source_facts.description says Jsonnet is a domain specific configuration language for defining JSON data; official Jsonnet docs call it the data templating language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is https://jsonnet.org/; official pages use Jsonnet capitalization.
docs_sources: Official jsonnet.org learning and reference pages provide getting started, language reference, and specification documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Jsonnet reference describe a language for generating JSON data.
